title: tragacantha rugosa
intro: Tragacantha rugosa, also known as the common broom or broom spurge, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Tragacantha rugosa include wound healing, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
